game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Space Marshals:** Players control a specialist in a top-down tactical shooter using a left virtual joystick for movement and a right virtual joystick for aiming and firing their equipped weapons, with a tap to interact or use selected utility items. Core combat involves utilizing environmental cover (e.g., crates, walls) to reduce incoming damage by 75%, flanking enemies for bonus damage, and deploying tactical gear such as frag grenades (limited to 3 per mission) or proximity mines. Stealth is a key mechanic, allowing players to sneak past enemies using disguises or eliminate them covertly with silenced weapons (e.g., 20 damage per shot), with enemy awareness indicated by visual cones and sound detection meters. Progression occurs across three episodic chapters, with each mission offering performance-based rewards (e.g., 1-3 stars) that unlock new weapons (e.g., shotguns, sniper rifles, energy weapons, each with unique damage and range stats) and body armor. Before each mission, players select a loadout comprising one two-handed weapon, one single-handed weapon, body armor, and up to three utility items, directly influencing their tactical approach. Difficulty scales per mission through increased enemy numbers (e.g., 5-15 per area), varied enemy types with distinct weapon loadouts and patrol patterns, and more complex objective requirements, with mission failure occurring if the player's health reaches zero.
game_info.description: You are a tactical specialist navigating dangerous enemy territory. Your mission: eliminate all hostiles while using cover, stealth, and strategic positioning. Use environmental cover to reduce damage, flank enemies for bonus damage, and deploy tactical gear wisely. Sneak past patrols or eliminate them silently. Complete missions to unlock better weapons and armor. Stay alert—enemy awareness is indicated by visual cones. Your health is precious; reach zero and the mission fails.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Fire your equipped weapon / Use selected utility item
Z: Switch between primary and secondary weapons
Shift: Toggle stealth mode (crouch/stand)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart and return to the start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and navigation mechanics. Validates that the player can move in all four directions and that position updates correctly in the game state.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will cycle through all four arrow key directions systematically, moving the player around the map to verify collision detection and movement boundaries work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move smoothly in all directions without getting stuck. Position values in gameState should update correctly. The test is successful when all movement directions are validated without errors.

TEST_1.expected: The player should move smoothly in all directions without getting stuck. Position values in gameState should update correctly. The test is successful when all movement directions are validated without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by implementing an optimal combat strategy. This validates that enemies can be eliminated and the mission can be completed successfully.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will use cover strategically, approach enemies while in stealth mode when possible, use flanking positions for bonus damage, and deploy grenades against grouped enemies. It will switch weapons based on distance and situation.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All enemies should be eliminated and the game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test is successful when the win condition is achieved within a reasonable timeframe and without player death.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests stealth mechanics and enemy detection systems. Validates that stealth mode reduces detection and that enemies respond appropriately to player presence.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Move through the level in stealth mode, testing the boundaries of enemy detection cones. Attempt to navigate past enemies without triggering combat, then deliberately break stealth to test alert states.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player should be able to move undetected when properly using stealth and cover. Enemies should only detect the player when within their vision cones or when the player fires. Test succeeds when stealth mechanics work consistently.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests cover mechanics and damage reduction. Validates that being behind cover reduces incoming damage by the specified percentage.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Position the player behind cover objects and allow enemies to fire. Monitor health reduction and verify that damage is reduced appropriately when in cover versus when exposed.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Damage taken should be 75% less when behind cover compared to being exposed. The test succeeds when cover mechanics consistently reduce damage as specified.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests utility item usage including grenades and mines. Validates that items have limited quantities and produce expected effects.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Deploy grenades near enemy clusters to test area damage. Place proximity mines in enemy patrol paths. Verify that item counts decrease with use and that items cannot be used when depleted.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Grenades should damage multiple enemies in their blast radius. Mines should trigger when enemies approach. Item counts should be tracked correctly. Test succeeds when all utility mechanics work as designed.
